title: Afghanistan Futsal National Team Website Launches Matchday Hub
summary: The website now brings squad profiles, upcoming fixtures, gallery moments, and supporter updates into one modern matchday experience.

title: Supporters Prepare For Summer Fixture Run
summary: Fan groups are preparing watch-party plans and community coverage as the upcoming match schedule begins to take shape.

title: Core Squad Profiles Added To Team Page
summary: The team page now loads player profiles dynamically, making roster updates easier as confirmed information becomes available.

title: Gallery Slots Ready For Fan Submissions
summary: The visual archive is ready for match photos, training scenes, supporter images, and milestone moments from the futsal community.
